zh.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay於1455年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內圖爾-素-馬內。他於1495年12月9日與Louise d'Albret結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年享年72歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特希馬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay于1455年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內圖爾-素-馬內。他于1495年12月9日与Louise d'Albret结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1527年享年72岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特希馬。

nameMeanings.name: Croy-
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from any of several places called Croy, for example in Inverness-shire.
Probably also Irish: shortened form of   McCroy  , which is a variant of   McRoy  .

nameMeanings.name: Chimay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Amerindian (Mexico): from the root of Nahuatl (Aztec) chimalli ‘shield’.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay was born in 1455, in Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. He married Louise d'Albret on 9 December 1495. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1527, at the age of 72, and was buried in Chimay, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay est né en 1455, à Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Il a épousé Louise d'Albret le 9 décembre 1495. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1527, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Chimay, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay wurde 1455 in Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren. Er hat am 9. Dezember 1495 Louise d'Albret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1527 im Alter von 72 Jahren und wurde in Chimay, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay è nato il nel 1455 nel Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Lui sposato Louise d'Albret il 9 dicembre 1495. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1527, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Chimay, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimayは1455年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルントウルス-スル-マルンで生まれた。1495年12月9日にLouise d'Albretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1527年に72歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトチメイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay(은)는 1455년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 토우르스-수-마니에서 태어났다. 그는 1495년 12월 9일 Louise d'Albret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 치메이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay nasceu em 1455, em Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Ele casou-se com Louise d'Albret em 9 de dezembro de 1495. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1527, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Chimay, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay родился в 1455 г. в местности тоурс-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Louise d'Albret 9 декабря 1495 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1527 г. в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности чимеи, ханаут, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Charles Croy- Chimay nació en 1455, en Tours-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Se casó con Louise d'Albret el 9 de diciembre de 1495. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1527, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Chimay, Hainaut, Bélgica.
